summary: A Go-based orchestration tool that detects, runs, and reports on schema assertions with plugin support.
concerns: Uncommitted changes (4 modified, 1 staged) suggest incomplete work
Heavy reliance on test files for understanding core logic indicates possible lack of inline documentation
Session transcript archiving in source tree could bloat repository over time
suggestions: Commit or stash the pending changes to maintain a clean working tree
Add package-level documentation to internal packages to reduce dependency on reading tests
Move archived session transcripts to external storage or git-lfs
Focus on completing the v0.2.0 release cleanup based on recent commit activity
